title: Missing columns

posts.author: Carlos-i (Carlos Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone
I will appreciate your feedback.
Some our users can see some columns in the subitems, I already check they dont have any filters and everyone has access to all the boards, some of them have admin privileges, any thoughts?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Carlos-i

We’d love to take a look in to this further! Can you please shoot us an email to support@monday.com with a screenshot of the two different scenarios your users are experiencing?
Our team will be able to dig a little deeper and continue to assist from here!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Carlos-i (Carlos Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dani

Ok, I will send the images, Thank you very much,

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re welcome!

Let us know if there’s anything else we can help with

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey again @Carlos-i

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as solved.
This means that the thread will close in 7 days time

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani
